entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
This course includeds the following topic(s): Math Lessons: Grade 2, Math Games: Grades 1-8

About Math Lessons: Grade 2
Discover mathematical concepts using manipulatives. Learn strategies and build agility through mental math. RightStart B Primary Skill Focus: Addition, Subtraction

About Math Games: Grades 1-8
Practice and learn math facts through games.

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content:
Math Lessons: Grade 2
Students who are new to RightStart Math should take the placement test on the RightStart website (rightstartmath.com).
Prerequisite: RightStart A or appropriate skill proficiency
